signals.reasoning: Cover the live MON short. It is still profitable, but it has now given back nearly half of peak P&L and the warning is active again, so protecting the remaining gain is the cleaner decision.
BTC is constructive but does not offer enough edge to outrank the stronger alt setups on this board.
ETH is also constructive but still not a standout setup relative to the better longs and fades below.
SOL remains one of the better long candidates because mechanics are bullish and funding is still negative enough to support continuation.
ZEREBRO lacks enough trade quality and clean edge to justify action here.
STBL remains a clean bearish fade because funding is strongly positive, crowding is high, and the upside still looks fragile.
FARTCOIN is a modest bearish lean because the board still tilts negative and the tape is not showing strong recovery structure.
BLUR has some improving squeeze-long traits, but the setup is not clean enough to justify action over stronger names.
PURR remains too thin and noisy to be actionable.
MERL is a reasonable secondary long because mechanics have turned more constructive and the market is no longer fighting with strongly positive funding.
DASH is still one of the best long candidates because mechanics are strong and funding remains deeply negative, which supports a squeeze-style continuation.
